title: Xtra Nutty Canadian Lamb Tagine
description: A hearty and aromatic Canadian dish featuring lamb, kabse spice, and nuts, perfect for a hangover cure. This halal-friendly recipe is cooked to perfection in a tagine pot.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
Combine kabse spice, olive oil, garlic, and salt in a bowl to make the marinade.
Add the lamb cubes to the marinade and mix well to coat.
Let the lamb marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Heat the olive oil in the tagine pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion to the pot and cook until it is softened.
Add the marinated lamb to the pot and cook until it is browned on all sides.
Add the sliced almonds, prunes, chicken broth, and honey to the pot.
Cover the pot and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Cook the tagine for 2.5 hours or until the lamb is tender.
Season the tagine with black pepper to taste.
